changelog:
🔥 Spoty v1.0.44 Update!

1. Modern Profile: New Spotify-style Avatar on Home & other screens. Set/remove your photo from the Profile page (photo is included in backups!).
2. Smooth Downloads: Download progress animations in the Library are now buttery smooth.
3. Fast Restore: Restoring from backup is now 3x faster, with a persistent queue to resume downloads if the app is closed.
4. Bug Fixes: Fixed "Clear Artwork Cache" functionality and improved Artist name extraction from YouTube.
